Who I Am

A Bit About Me

"Curious by nature,
driven by technology."

I am Megha Vikas Khakre, a first-year B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering student at MIT Vishwaprayag University, Maharashtra. With a strong passion for technology and problem solving, I am constantly exploring the world of programming and software development.

I am enthusiastic about building innovative solutions, learning new technologies like AI and UI/UX design, and contributing to projects that make a meaningful difference in the world.

B.Tech CSE, MIT Vishwaprayag University
Interested in AI, UI/UX & Software Development
Based in Maharashtra, India
Open to internships & collaborations
